name: Recipients Only (Protected)
description: Use this classification to protect Confidential messages in Outlook. Recipients cannot forward, copy, or print the message.
tooltip: Use this classification to protect Confidential messages in Outlook. Recipients cannot forward, copy, or print the message.

parent.name: Confidential
parent.description: Use this classification to identify and protect data which is sensitive, and which should be shared more carefully.
parent.tooltip: Use this classification to identify and protect data which is sensitive, and which should be shared more carefully.
